General.Name: Adtiger Corp Ltd
General.Description: Adtiger Corporations Limited, an investment holding company, provides online advertising services in Mainland China, Singapore, Hong Kong, Indonesia and internationally. The company's online advertising platform connects its advertisers with its media publishers directly or indirectly through resellers designated by its media publishers. It also provides overseas online advertising services to China-based advertisers. In addition, the company offers marketing services, including performance advertising, influencer marketing, brand public relations services, video advertising production, etc. The company was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.

0.Name: Ms. Sufang  Chang
